product.name: Nature's Gift Meal Time Dog Can Food - Lamb Pasta & Vegetables

metaData.Ingredients: Corn, Pultry Meat, Rice, Soybean Meal, Chicken Oil, Full Fat Soybean, Brewer's Dried Yeast, Lecithin, Fish Oil, Iodized Salt, Vitamins and Mineral, Antioxidants, Roast Beef Flavouring, Food Colouring
metaData.Key Information: SmartHeart adult dog food is formulated to meet adult dog's requirements using the best quality ingredients and supplemented with fish oil (rich in DHA and omega-3 fatty acid) and lecithin (rich in choline) to help enhance brain and nervous system function and promote heart health.
metaData.Preparation:
• Feeding Directions:
1. Body weight less than 5kg: 80g - 150g per day
2. Body weight 5kg - 10kg: 150 - 250g per day
3. Body weight 10kg - 25kg: 250g - 430g per day
4. Body weight 25kg - 50kg: 430g - 730g per day
metaData.SAP Product Name: SMARTHEART DRY DOG FOOD - ADULT ROAST BEEF
metaData.Storage Information:
• Directions:
1. Always keep remaining food re-sealed in the bag or put in a re-closable container
2. Store food in dry and cool place and avoid exposing to direct sunlight
• Warning:
To avoid digestive upset assosiciated with the food change, slowly replace increasing qualities of old food with SmartHeart adult dog food to completely replace the old food in 5 - 7 days
